# S'posh APPEAL

S'posh APPEAL is a premium unisex beauty salon and studio based in Lekki Phase 1, Lagos, Nigeria. The brand specializes in high-end, personalized beauty and styling services, offering both in-studio appointments and home services.

## Contact Information
- **Location**: Plot 15, Admiralty Way, Lekki Phase 1, Lagos, Nigeria
- **Phone**: +234 913 128 2016
- **WhatsApp Support**: +234 701 108 3217
- **Operating Hours**:
  - Monday - Friday: 09:00 - 18:00
  - Saturday: 08:00 - 19:00
  - Sunday: 10:00 - 17:00
- **Official Website**: https://sposhappeal.vercel.app/
- **Socials**:
  - Instagram: https://instagram.com/sposhappeal_001
  - Facebook: https://web.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61573953737973
  - TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@sposhappeal

## Services & Pricing (Starting Prices)
- **Hair Making**: ₦5,000 (Braids, weaves, twists, washes, natural styling, and treatments)
- **Wig Install & Sales**: ₦7,000 (Frontal/closure installs, custom wig making, revamping)
- **Nail Art**: ₦3,000 (Acrylic fixing, luxury manicure & pedicure, custom designs, chrome)
- **Lash & Brow**: ₦8,000 (Individual extensions, mega-volume, brow styling)
- **Makeup Studio**: ₦8,000 (Bridal, birthday, events, photoshoots, soft glam)
- **Personal Care**: ₦10,000 (Facials, steam facials, pore extraction, skincare)
- **Men's Grooming**: ₦2,500 (Precision haircuts, fades, trims)

## Booking & Reservation Rules
- **Appointment Page**: https://sposhappeal.vercel.app/booking.html
- **Deposit Policy**: A deposit is required to confirm all bookings (usually 30% of total service cost). Slots are automatically marked pending and released if the deposit is not paid.
- **Rescheduling & Cancellation**: Permitted up to 24 hours before the appointment. Changes within 24 hours of the slot are locked.
- **Home Service**: Available upon request for select services. An address is required during checkout.
